milestones.notes: Native OpenClaw plugin direction, OWS security model, and cron-based periodic agent spec are documented.
Repo-level guidance, script entrypoints, and initial eval matrix exist.
Package manifest, plugin manifest, entrypoint, CLI registrar, workspace generation, profile persistence, and vendored skills are now implemented.
Need a reproducible OpenClaw + OWS + Morpho local environment.

OWS policy creation, OpenClaw agent/cron orchestration, Morpho reads, deterministic dry-run planning, and the current OWS-sign-plus-broadcast live wrapper are implemented. End-to-end live verification is still blocked by missing local binaries.
Current evals are documented, not yet executable end-to-end.

checks.notes: Security and spec invariants are present in repository docs.
Entry point works, but local environment reported missing openclaw and ows binaries.
Dry-run executed against a temporary profile and live Morpho data, returned a planned rebalance, and wrote a receipt JSON.
Script refuses live execution unless VAULT_MANAGER_ALLOW_LIVE=1 is set.
The native OpenClaw plugin package and CLI implementation typecheck successfully.
The Morpho CLI invocation is fixed, but this environment still lacks openclaw and ows on PATH.
Blocked by missing openclaw on PATH in the current environment.

details: openclaw is not available on PATH in the current environment
ows is not available on PATH in the current environment

nextActions: Add a deterministic local dev harness for OpenClaw, OWS, and Morpho tooling.
Verify the live execution path end to end on a machine with openclaw and ows installed.
Convert the documented eval matrix into executable end-to-end checks.
Add richer structured logs and metrics around rebalance phases and receipts.
